codeReview.summary: Reviewed handoff, transcript skeleton, and commit 7af90bf. The implementation covers the feature requirements: auth checks were added to all 4 connect routes with 401 responses, callbacks validate state, self-fetch to /api/social-accounts was removed, tokens are encrypted before direct DB upsert, OAuth cookies are cleared on success, and callbacks redirect to /settings with connected/error query params.

summary: Feature implementation is consistent with description and expected behavior; no blocking or non-blocking defects were identified from the reviewed diff and transcript evidence.
